current_wind.description: Moderate crosswind from SW, pushing NE

wind_info.description: Moderate crosswind from the right, pushing left

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH, wind pushes left, exposes underside. Prefer RHFH. Use a stable disc for RHFH, aim to land softly.
LHBH, natural fade goes right, wind pushes left. Works together. Smooth hyzer.
